title: quercus spicata var. microcalyx
intro: Quercus spicata var. microcalyx, also known as a variety of the Spiny Live Oak, is a plant species within the white oak family that is native to Central and South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Quercus spicata var. microcalyx include its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, as well as its possible role in supporting cardiovascular and immune system health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
